contentPattern.structure: rows of question (title) + answer (content) toggled open/closed

suitableFor: long lists of expandable detail rows
notSuitableFor: content that should always be fully visible

implementationNotes: Used for section 11 (19 FAQ items). Project-native (init(el)) - removed the boilerplate moveInstrumentation import which does not exist in this project. Each block row (question | answer) becomes a <details> with summary.accordion-faq-item-label and div.accordion-faq-item-body. CSS uses project variables (--color-light, --color-background).
